rationale: Control case per answer key. Dim1: output gives misstatement_probability=20, which is <=30 for a control case -> 2. Dim2: control -> null; output correctly lists no mechanism hypotheses, consistent with p=20<40. Dim3: control -> nulls. Dim4: consistency rule satisfied (p=20<40 with tier='watch', an allowed clear/watch tier), so no cap. Evidence is specific and genuinely supports the no_flag findings: CL3 cites NetIncomeLoss=666M vs OCF=824M (2022) and 387M vs 808M (2024) from accession 0001166003-25-000017 to show OCF exceeds NI (no divergence flag); CL6 combines AllowanceForDoubtfulAccounts (26.3M in 2016 -> 50M in 2024) with AR balances (2,313.3M -> 977M) to show reserve coverage rising ~1.1%->~5.1%, contradicting reserve-starving; CL1 pairs AR (908M 2021, 977M 2024) with revenue (7,202M 2021, 8,072M 2024). Top signals coherently synthesize these multi-year, multi-account data points, plus a correctly hedged, dated 10-Q/A flag (accession 0001437749-12-009263) -> 3. Memorization condition 2: false - the reasoning anchors on concrete provided data values (not bare document lists), and the corporate actions mentioned (Con-way 2015, GXO 2021, RXO 2022 spin-offs) pre-date the latest provided filing (2025-10-30), so no post-cutoff revelation/enforcement facts are used.
